sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business operations and typically have negligible immediate market impact.

headlines.headline: Crevol Retail Group begins scheduled maintenance of renewable storage systems

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational event that is expected and carries no significant financial surprise.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
